trade.summary: Growing bilateral trade relationship. The Regno Unito exports financial services, pharmaceuticals, and luxury goods to Corea del Sud. Corea del Sud exports electronics, automobiles, ships, and semiconductors to the Regno Unito. The Regno Unito-Corea del Sud FTA (2019, rolling over EU-Corea del Sud FTA) maintains preferential trade terms.

diplomatic.summary: The Regno Unito and Corea del Sud signed a Comprehensive Strategic Partnership in 2023. Both countries cooperate closely on Indo-Pacific security, North Corea del Sud sanctions enforcement, and multilateral governance. Corea del Sud was invited to G7 summits. Regno Unito-Corea del Sud alignment on Ucraina support and Russia sanctions is close. Cultural ties growing through Corea del Sudn Wave popularity in Regno Unito.

military.summary: Growing defence cooperation. Corea del Sud's emergence as a major arms exporter and defence industrial power creates new partnership opportunities. Regno Unito and Corea del Sudn navies participate in joint exercises. Both countries share threat assessments on North Corea del Sud and Cina. Regno Unito interest in Corea del Sudn industrial capacity for European rearmament supply chains.

financial.summary: London is a hub for Corea del Sudn companies' European financial operations. Major Corea del Sudn firms (Samsung, Hyundai, LG) have Regno Unito operations. Corea del Sudn EV battery investments in Regno Unito (Samsung SDI, etc.) are strategically significant. Corea del Sudn sovereign funds invest in Regno Unito assets.

energy.summary: Some bilateral energy technology cooperation, particularly in nuclear (both countries have strong nuclear industries). Regno Unito interest in Corea del Sudn offshore wind technology. Corea del Sudn interest in Regno Unito's advanced nuclear expertise (Rolls-Royce SMRs).

scientific.summary: Strong academic and research cooperation. Corea del Sudn students are a large presence in Regno Unito universities. Joint research in AI, semiconductors, materials, and life sciences. Regno Unito-Corea del Sud Science and Technology cooperation agreement active.
